overall.description: First-person perspective from inside a Mercedes truck cabin driving on a snowy multi-lane highway in a truck simulation game. The vehicle navigates curved highway sections, passes under concrete overpasses, and approaches a service area while windshield wipers periodically clear falling snow. The surrounding landscape features snow-covered fields and trees with moderate traffic of cars and trucks.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy highway curve with agricultural fields

events.description: windshield wipers activate to clear accumulating snow from windshield

agents.ego_description: navigating a curved highway on-ramp while maintaining steady speed in snowy conditions

notable_agents.action: white truck traveling in the left lane, overtaking the ego vehicle

entered.detail: flat agricultural fields blanketed in snow extending to the horizon
metal guardrails lining the left side of the highway
scattered deciduous trees with snow-laden branches
large concrete highway overpass structure approaching in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on a curved highway ramp surrounded by snow-covered fields and scattered trees. The truck's windshield wipers activate to clear falling snow as the vehicle approaches a concrete overpass in the distance. Sparse traffic includes a white truck overtaking on the left, while metal guardrails line the left side of the road.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane highway passing under concrete overpasses

events.description: passes underneath the first concrete overpass, temporarily blocking sky visibility
merges into denser traffic flow with multiple vehicles in adjacent lanes

agents.ego_description: maintaining highway speed while passing under overpasses and navigating through moderate traffic

notable_agents.action: silver sedan driving ahead in the same lane, maintaining distance

entered.detail: blue highway directional signs suspended over the roadway indicating exits

segments.scene_description: The truck drives under concrete overpasses that temporarily shelter the vehicle from snowfall, creating mixed lighting conditions. Blue overhead road signs appear indicating highway directions. Traffic density increases to moderate levels with a silver sedan visible ahead. The snow-covered fields exit the frame as the highway continues through a more built-up corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway approaching service plaza with parking and fuel facilities

events.description: service station buildings and parking signs become visible on the left side of the highway

agents.ego_description: continuing along the highway while approaching the service area, maintaining lane position

entered.detail: blue parking signs with white 'P' symbols indicating service area access
large service station structure with fuel pumps and parking facilities

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the truck approaching a highway service area on the left, marked by blue parking signs and a large service station building. The concrete overpasses are now behind the vehicle, and the sky is fully visible again with continued snowfall. The road remains snow-covered with moderate traffic continuing in both directions.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a truck cabin as it moves from an open, snowy highway ramp into a more developed transit corridor. It begins on a curved section of road surrounded by snow-covered fields and scattered trees, with windshield wipers clearing falling snow as a white truck overtakes on the left. As the vehicle advances, the open landscape shifts into a built-up corridor where the truck passes under concrete overpasses that temporarily shelter it from the snow and create flickering light patterns beneath blue overhead road signs. The scene then expands back into the open air as the overpasses recede, revealing a sky filled with falling snow and moderate traffic. Finally, the camera approaches a highway service area on the left, marked by blue parking signs and a large service station building.
